title: narcissus papyraceus var. gennarii
intro: Narcissus papyraceus var. gennarii, also known as the Italian or Mediterranean paper white, is a species of flowering bulbous plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Narcissus papyraceus var. gennarii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve using the dried bulbs, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
